## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. 

---

### 🔗 Related Issue

Fixes/Closes/Resolves #

---

### 🧪 Type of Change

Please mark the options that are relevant:

- [ ] `fix` (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `feat` (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `refactor` (code restructuring or optimization without behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` (documentation updates or fixes)
- [ ] `style` (formatting, white-space, linting, etc.)
- [ ] `ci` / `chore` (CI workflows, dependency updates, or release tasks)

---

### 📸 Visual Changes (UI/UX)

If your changes affect the frontend visual layout or interaction design:

| Before | After |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Insert screenshot/GIF* | *Insert screenshot/GIF* |

---

###  Checklist

- [ ] **Conventional Commits**: My PR title matches the Conventional Commits format (e.g., `feat(web): add light/dark mode toggle` or `fix(connector): resolve memory leak`).
- [ ] **Tests & Verification**: I have verified the changes locally, ensuring code builds and all standard formatting/lint/type checks pass.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have updated the documentation or `README.md` if the change introduces new configuration flags or components.
- [ ] **AI-Assisted Contribution**: If I used an LLM or AI tool to assist, I have fully reviewed the changes, understand every line of code, and take personal responsibility for the contribution.
